title: tetranthera citrata
intro: Tetranthera citrata, also known as the Chinese citron or Chinese bitter orange, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. It is native to southern China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding properties. The health benefits of Tetranthera citrata include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Tetranthera citrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
